name: Custom Browser Main Page
description: Custom Browser Main Page you can add image for your wallpaper by AgustinBenitez
author: Agustin Benitez

content_security_policy.extension_pages: script-src 'self'; object-src 'self'; img-src 'self' data: https:; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline' https://cdnjs.cloudflare.com; connect-src 'self' https://api.open-meteo.com
